option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
# Link - Database Configuration
# Driver to use: sqlite | mysql | mariadb | postgresql # SQLite requires no server setup and is the default. Ideal for single-server setups. # For networks or high-traffic servers, use mysql, mariadb, or postgresql. driver: sqlite
# Path to the SQLite database file (only used when driver is 'sqlite') # Just the filename — the file will always be placed in the plugin's data folder. file: "link.db"
# Remote database settings (ignored when driver is 'sqlite') host: "localhost" port: 3306 name: "link" username: "username" password: "password" pool: # Maximum number of connections kept in the pool (forced to 1 for SQLite) maximum-pool-size: 10
# Minimum number of idle connections maintained minimum-idle: 2
# Milliseconds to wait for a connection before throwing an error (default: 10s) connection-timeout: 10000
# Milliseconds a connection can sit idle before being retired (default: 10m) idle-timeout: 600000
# Milliseconds before a connection is retired regardless of activity. # Must be less than your database server's wait_timeout. # Lower this if you see "Failed to validate connection" warnings. (default: 30m) max-lifetime: 1800000
# Milliseconds between keepalive pings on idle connections. # Prevents the server from closing idle connections. (default: 1m) keepalive-time: 60000

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Link - Database Configuration
# Driver to use: sqlite | mysql | mariadb | postgresql # SQLite requires no server setup and is the default. Ideal for single-server setups. # For networks or high-traffic servers, use mysql, mariadb, or postgresql. driver: sqlite
# Path to the SQLite database file (only used when driver is 'sqlite') # Just the filename — the file will always be placed in the plugin's data folder. file: "sqlite/link.db"
# Remote database settings (ignored when driver is 'sqlite') host: "localhost" port: 3306 name: "link" username: "username" password: "password" pool: # Maximum number of connections kept in the pool (forced to 1 for SQLite) maximum-pool-size: 10
# Minimum number of idle connections maintained minimum-idle: 2
# Milliseconds to wait for a connection before throwing an error (default: 10s) connection-timeout: 10000
# Milliseconds a connection can sit idle before being retired (default: 10m) idle-timeout: 600000
# Milliseconds before a connection is retired regardless of activity. # Must be less than your database server's wait_timeout. # Lower this if you see "Failed to validate connection" warnings. (default: 30m) max-lifetime: 1800000
# Milliseconds between keepalive pings on idle connections. # Prevents the server from closing idle connections. (default: 1m) keepalive-time: 60000

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
name: Link version: 1.0.0 api-version: "1.21" main: com.huskydreaming.link.spigotmc.LinkSpigotPlugin description: "Link - links Minecraft accounts with Discord. Supports standalone and velocity-bridge modes." authors: - HuskyDreaming
commands: link: description: Link your Minecraft account with Discord. Use '/link reload' to reload config (requires link.reload permission). usage: /link [reload] permission: link.link unlink: description: Unlink your Minecraft account from Discord. usage: /unlink permission: link.unlink
permissions: link.link: description: Allows players to use /link. default: true link.unlink: description: Allows players to use /unlink. default: true link.reload: description: Allows use of /link reload to reload the plugin configuration. default: op

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Link version: ${version} api-version: "1.21" main: com.huskydreaming.link.spigotmc.LinkSpigotPlugin description: "Link - links Minecraft accounts with Discord. Supports standalone and velocity-bridge modes." authors: - HuskyDreaming
commands: link: description: Link your Minecraft account with Discord. Use '/link reload' to reload config (requires link.reload permission). usage: /link [reload] permission: link.link unlink: description: Unlink your Minecraft account from Discord. usage: /unlink permission: link.unlink
permissions: link.link: description: Allows players to use /link. default: true link.unlink: description: Allows players to use /unlink. default: true link.reload: description: Allows use of /link reload to reload the plugin configuration. default: op
